subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hearkened unto the Call of God, the Lord of the worlds, and answered it on a Day wherein most turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع ندآء الله رب العالمین و اجابه فی یوم فیه اعرض عنه اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment
